message:
fix(api): Validate pagination params to prevent NaN issues

parseInt() returns NaN for invalid input like "abc", and Math.max(1, NaN)
returns NaN instead of 1. This causes pagination to fail silently.

Fixed by adding Number.isFinite() validation in:
- /api/admin/appeals
- /api/admin/reports
- /api/admin/tickets
- /api/admin/users
- /api/dmca

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
